PANASONIC LUMIX S1H

Cinema in your hands.

Full-frame mirrorless. 6K Cinema 4:2:2 10-bit.
Built for filmmakers who refuse to compromise.

BODY ARCHITECTURE

Engineered for the
uncompromising frame.

A precision-machined magnesium alloy chassis.
Dust, splash, and freeze-resistant to –10°C.
Built to survive the conditions your story demands.

INTERNAL SYSTEMS

Every component,
a deliberate choice.

Phase-hybrid autofocus wired directly into the sensor.
Dual native ISO for shadow depth without penalty.
A Venus Engine processor that never falls behind.

SENSOR TECHNOLOGY

47.3 megapixels.
Full-frame. Full truth.

A back-illuminated full-frame CMOS sensor with phase-hybrid AF covering the entire frame. 14 stops of dynamic range. Every shadow. Every highlight.

From 6K Cinema RAW to V-Log L — the S1H captures the world as your eye does.

INTELLIGENT AF · IBIS

Autofocus that
reads the scene.

Phase-hybrid AF detects human eyes, animals, and moving subjects in real time — no hunting, no hesitation.

5-axis Dual I.S. 2 — up to 6.5 stops of stabilization. Camera and lens working as one system.

See everything.
Miss nothing.

"The Lumix S1H isn't just a camera.
It's a statement."

Panasonic Lumix S1H — Full - Frame Cinema

CINEMATIC PROFILE

Form meets
uncompromising function.

Every angle of the Lumix S1H is built for the professional.
A robust magnesium alloy body ready for any rig,
designed to dissipate heat and endure the elements.

OPTICAL PERFECTION

The heart of
the image.

Exposing the L-Mount ecosystem and the massive
full-frame sensor beneath. A clear, direct path
for light to hit the BSI CMOS surface.

EXPANDED ARCHITECTURE

Layered for
absolute performance.

Stripping back the layers reveals the thermal management
system and sensor-shift stabilization.

Unlimited recording time. Zero compromises. This is how
the S1H delivers 6K without breaking a sweat.

INTEGRATED POWER

Unified.
Unstoppable.

The internal architecture collapses back into a cohesive,
weather-sealed form. A complete cinema tool.

BSI CMOS

DUAL NATIVE ISO
FPC RIBBON
Buy

From ₹2,49,990* or ₹41,665/mo. for 6 mo.‡

The Lumix S1H is the world's most capable cinema mirrorless — for a lot of reasons. It shoots 6K Cinema 4:2:2 10-bit with no recording limit. The full-frame BSI CMOS sensor unlocks a whole new level of image quality for cinema and stills. 5-Axis Dual I.S. 2 is built in to help you shoot handheld effortlessly.¹ And it comes in a body sealed against dust, splash, and freeze conditions to –10°C. With the Lumix S1H, you'll be ready to capture just about anything, anywhere.

Features

Built for
uncompromising
filming.

Image Quality

See everything.
Miss nothing.

00:00:00

Filmed with Lumix S1H  #LumixS1H

The Lumix S1H sets a new standard for cinematic mirrorless recording — with a full-frame BSI CMOS sensor that captures 14+ stops of dynamic range and dual native ISO circuits that keep noise invisible, even in near darkness.

Record unlimited 6K Cinema 4:2:2 10-bit internally. Grade in V-Log/V-Gamut for a billion possible colours. The only mirrorless camera approved for Netflix original production.

Shot in V-Log L · Lumix S1H

Dynamic Range

14+ Stops. Nothing lost.

V-Log/V-Gamut captures everything from the deepest shadows to blown highlights in a single exposure. Over 14 stops of dynamic range — rivalling dedicated cinema cameras like the Panasonic VariCam. Latitude that lets you push the grade as far as you want in post.

Dual Native ISO · Lumix S1H

Low Light

Dual Native ISO. Darkness defeated.

Two dedicated circuits per pixel — ISO 640 and ISO 4000 as true native bases. Each is clean, noise-free, with full colour fidelity. Push further to ISO 51,200. Extend to 204,800. Shoot in near-darkness without compromise.

4:2:2 10-bit internal · Lumix S1H

Colour Science

1 Billion Colors. 4:2:2 10-bit.

Internal 4:2:2 10-bit recording delivers ~128× the colour information of standard 8-bit footage. Every skin tone, every gradient, every subtle shift preserved at the source. Radical colour grading in post — turn daylight into night, summer into winter.

6K Open Gate · Lumix S1H

Cinema Formats

6K Full-Frame. Every aspect ratio.

6K open gate (3:2), 5.9K 16:9, C4K, 4K 4:3 anamorphic — one camera covers every format and aspect ratio used in professional cinema. No crop. No compromise. Switch formats without changing lenses.

High Resolution Mode · Lumix S1H

High Resolution

96MP stills. Sensor-shift precision.

Composites 8 sensor-shift exposures into a single 96MP RAW file at 12,000 × 8,000px. When 24.2MP isn't enough — for print, billboard, or fine-art reproduction. No additional lens required.

1

Quoted MRP is for 1 unit of the product. Prices are subject to change without prior notice.

2

6K/24p (3:2) and 5.9K/30p (16:9) cinematic video recording requires high-speed V90 SDXC UHS-II or CFexpress Type B memory cards.

3

Dual Native ISO operates automatically, switching between native ISO 640 and ISO 4000 in V-Log to minimize noise.

4

14+ stops of dynamic range are achieved when recording in V-Log/V-Gamut. Results may vary depending on lighting conditions via Panasonic's testing standards.

5

V-Log/V-Gamut features are pre-installed. No additional software upgrade or unlock key is required for the Lumix S1H.

6

Dust and Splash Resistant does not guarantee that damage will not occur if this camera is subjected to direct contact with dust and water. Weather resistance requires the use of weather-sealed Lumix S Series lenses.

7

5-axis Dual I.S. 2 can be used with compatible Lumix S Series lenses. Up to 6.5 stops of stabilization is based on the CIPA standard [Yaw/Pitch direction: focusing distance f=105mm when S-R24105 is used].

8

Continuous recording time is subject to ambient temperature and battery level. Unlimited recording time is possible when the camera is operated within recommended operating temperatures (40°C or lower).

9

Apple ProRes RAW and Blackmagic RAW recording require an external compatible monitor/recorder connected via HDMI.

10

Wi-Fi® and Bluetooth® functionality require the Panasonic LUMIX Sync app, available for free on iOS and Android devices.

11

Firmware updates may be required for certain external recording compatibility and newly introduced lens functions.

12

Some apps, contents, and/or features may not be available in all countries. Subject to availability and local regulations.

13

Design, specifications, and features are subject to change without notice to improve performance and usability.

14

Panasonic, Lumix, and Venus Engine are trademarks or registered trademarks of Panasonic Corporation.

* Quoted MRP is inclusive of all applicable taxes. Prices subject to change without notice.

* Actual product appearance may differ slightly from illustrations provided.

* Features, specifications, weight and price are subject to change without prior notice.

* Netflix approval applies to specific firmware versions. Consult Panasonic for current status.

* Battery life estimates based on CIPA standard measurements. Actual results may vary.
